preferredDeck: YouTube joins Freed with a focused study feed, exact-video playback, and a private playlist for YouTube Premium downloads
editorialGuidance: Keep the tone concise, professional, and specific.
Lead with user-facing outcomes, shipping milestones, trust wins, and installability improvements.
Demote internal cleanup unless it clearly changes the shipped product.
pinnedHighlights: Capture followed YouTube channels and recent long-form Subscriptions videos through a signed-in Freed Desktop session.
Keep Shorts and Reels out of the study feed, then watch a selected video in Focus Mode or open it directly in YouTube.
Build a private Freed Offline playlist and hand it to YouTube Premium for device downloads.
Keep display scaling geometry stable from 75% to 200% and prevent stale command search blur updates.
editorialNotes: YouTube is the lead story. Do not imply that Freed downloads or relays media in this release.
